game.name: Chocolate Keen - Keen 1
game.desc: Commander Keen 1 - Marooned on Mars. Chocolate Keen is a reverse engineering of Commander Keen in C/C++ and SDL. The goal is to be as accurate to the original as possible.

game.name: Chocolate Keen - Keen 2
game.desc: Commander Keen 2 - The Earth Explodes. Chocolate Keen is a reverse engineering of Commander Keen in C/C++ and SDL. The goal is to be as accurate to the original as possible.

game.name: Chocolate Keen - Keen 3
game.desc: Commander Keen 3 - Keen Must Die! Chocolate Keen is a reverse engineering of Commander Keen in C/C++ and SDL. The goal is to be as accurate to the original as possible.
